attributes.title: Low-Income-Persons (200 fpl)-Absolute
attributes.universe: Population for whom poverty status is determined
attributes.notes: Derived: Total minus income 2.00+ ratio = below 200% FPL; switched from S1701 (rows shift) to C17002 (stable)
attributes.concept: RATIO OF INCOME TO POVERTY LEVEL IN THE PAST 12 MONTHS

attributes.title: Low-Income-Persons (200 fpl)-Percent

attributes.notes: Derived percent from C17002; switched from S1701 (rows shift) to C17002 (stable)
